narrative:
Dunkirk / Blanchard (precinct in Hardin County) has 918 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
